summary: Test suite is incomplete and violates core task requirements. Critical issues: (1) Tests run directly against the script, NOT through act as explicitly mandated by task ('ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT...Do NOT test your script directly'). Only the final test uses act; all markdown/JSON output tests bypass the workflow. (2) Fixture files (all-ok.json, mixed.json, empty.json) are referenced but not provided—tests cannot execute. (3) Workflow file .github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml is missing entirely, preventing validation of how tests are invoked. (4) Coverage lacks error cases: invalid JSON, malformed dates, bad field values, invalid --format/--warning-days, boundary conditions (exact expiry date, warning threshold), and shellcheck/bash-n validation. (5) Inconsistency: days_overdue comment says 97 but test asserts 98. (6) The single act test is coarse (lumps all scenarios, uses fragile string matching) and doesn't verify fixture files exist in workflow context. Test suite is in a broken state—cannot run without fixtures, violates the mandate to test only through act, and lacks comprehensive error/edge case coverage.
